ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event occurred */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "node" TEXT /* Identifier for the node where the event was generated */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the event in a specific format */,
  "node_repeat" TEXT /* Repeated identifier for the node, if applicable */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., RAS, INFO) */,
  "component" TEXT /* Component generating the event (e.g., KERNEL) */,
  "level" TEXT /* Severity level of the event (e.g., INFO, ERROR) */,
  "content" TEXT /* Detailed content of the event message */,
  "event_source" TEXT /* Source of the event (e.g., application, hardware) */,
  "event_context" TEXT /* Additional context or metadata about the event */,
  "event_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the event in seconds */,
  "event_resolution" TEXT /* Status of the event resolution (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES event_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_node FOREIGN KEY ("node") REFERENCES nodes ("node_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_component FOREIGN KEY ("component") REFERENCES components ("component_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_level FOREIGN KEY ("level") REFERENCES levels ("level_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node */,
  "node_name" TEXT /* Name/identifier of the node */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical or logical location of the node */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the node */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last status check */,
  "node_type" TEXT /* Type of node (e.g., server, router, switch) */,
  "node_model" TEXT /* Model of the node */,
  "node_vendor" TEXT /* Vendor of the node */,
  "node_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the node */,
  "node_os" TEXT /* Operating system of the node */,
  "node_hardware_version" TEXT /* Hardware version of the node */,
  "node_last_reboot" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last reboot of the node */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type (e.g., RAS, INFO) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "type_priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the event type (e.g., 1 for critical, 5 for informational) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component (e.g., KERNEL) */,
  "component_type" TEXT /* Type of the component (e.g., software, hardware) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the component */,
  "component_location" TEXT /* Physical or logical location of the component */,
  "component_status" TEXT /* Current status of the component (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "component_last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each severity level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the severity level (e.g., INFO, ERROR) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the severity level */,
  "level_color" TEXT /* Color code for the severity level (e.g., green for info, red for error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user accessing the system */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "user_full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event was accessed */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Detailed alert message */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "alert_assigned_to" INTEGER /* User ID of the person assigned to handle the alert */,
  "alert_handled_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was handled */,
  "alert_resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the resolution of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_alert_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("alert_assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
